questionHtml:
Which technique is used to detect the isotopes of an element?

A.  Mass spectrometry

B.  Infrared spectroscopy

C.  Titration

D.  Recrystallization

meta.title: Which technique is used to detect the isotopes of an element? A. Mass spectrometry B. Infrared spectroscopy C. Titration D. Recrystallization
